title: Flipper Zero
html:
Flipper Zero

{{#include ../../../banners/hacktricks-training.md}}

With Flipper Zero you can:

  • Listen/Capture/Replay radio frequencies: Sub-GHz
  • Read/Capture/Emulate NFC cards: NFC
  • Read/Capture/Emulate 125kHz tags: 125kHz RFID
  • Read/Capture/Send Infrared signals: Infrared
  • Read/Capture/Emulate iButtons: iButton
  • Use is as Bad USB
  • Use it as security key (U2F)
  • Play Snake

Other Flipper Zero resources in https://github.com/djsime1/awesome-flipperzer

{{#include ../../../banners/hacktricks-training.md}}
